energy.title: Daily energy
energy.missingIntro: Add {{list}} to estimate how much energy your days use.
energy.explainer: Estimated from your weight, body details, and the ~{{kcal}} kcal/day of training you've logged this week. A guide, not a rule — and not medical advice.

overview.emptyWorkouts: Finish a workout and it shows up here.

weight.empty: Track your weight as a neutral trend. Log the first entry →

strength.empty: Log a few weighted sets to see strength trends.
strength.explainer: Estimated from your logged sets (load × reps × effort).

recovery.empty: Check in daily so your plan can adapt to how you actually feel.
recovery.tierMid: Middling — keep an eye on sleep.
recovery.tierLow: Low lately — the plan adapts to easier sessions.
